name: Susan Zhang
summary: A driven business major from Asheville, NC, she explored various facets of finance, ultimately securing a role in the financial sector with a strong work-life balance.

highlights: Focused on getting into business school.
Advanced in clubs and mass applied for jobs.
Explored consulting and participated in case competitions.
Completed a paid accounting internship in Charlotte.
Explored interest in consulting and accounting.
Dropped clubs after business school entrance.
Interned in private equity in NY through Girls Who Invest.
Recruited for TD Securities and BofA.
Interned at TD Securities with a strong work-life balance.

recruiting: Applied to a wide range of positions early in the process.
BofA offer received in August, reneged for TD Securities.
TD Securities recruited in Aug/Sep with a quick interview process and offer in November.
advice: Go out and experience as many things as you can.
Use freshman and sophomore years to explore different career paths.
